---
name: yk-3d-pet
description: Create and validate procedural 3D pets with semantic rigs, actions, idle behavior, symbols, and renderer integration.

Read `SKILL.md` and only the references needed for the task. Use the deterministic scaffold and validator. Keep generic work host-neutral and select the `yk-pets` preset only for YK-PETS hosts. Do not claim WebGL visual acceptance unless observed.
